description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden cabinet with a natural wood grain finish, featuring a rectangular profile and a flat top. The front side displays a combination of closed and open storage: a single upper door, two open shelves in the middle, and a lower door, all with subtle paneling. The sides are plain, showing the same wood texture, while the back appears to be a solid, lighter-colored panel. The cabinet is likely constructed from engineered or solid wood, with metal hinges and possibly small, unobtrusive handles. Its design is practical for urban environments, such as hallways, garages, or utility rooms, offering both concealed and open storage. The overall appearance is functional and modern, with a focus on maximizing vertical storage in a compact footprint.
description: A tall, narrow wooden cabinet with a natural wood finish, featuring upper and lower doors and two open shelves in the center. Its design is practical and modern, ideal for compact urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the upper and lower doors, two open shelves, and subtle wood grain paneling.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, continuous wood grain surface with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, lighter-colored back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain wood grain surface and no visible openings.
